_meta.selectionRule: Only yellow-filled columns from Motors, Propellers, and Batteries sheets.

motors.name: F40 Pro IV 2400
motors.recommendedUseCase: Racing quad, 5-inch freestyle
motors.notes: High-performance race motor. 2400KV variant optimal for 4S with 5-inch tri-blade props.

motors.name: Navigator MN3110 KV470
motors.recommendedUseCase: Mid-size photography quad, 330-450mm
motors.notes: Introduction of MN Series With the navigator design concept, T -Motor Navigator Series is mostly used in Aerial photo as the Mutlrotor Power system. The motor is a high quality, smooth running, durable brushless motor built for multirotor UAV application, the custom assembly methods and components unique to Navigator series help to provide the reliability required for a dependable aerial platform.
